raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mehneſi/ tad tappe weena Ga-
weſhana iſfaukta preeſch ta
KUNGA pee wiſſeem Laudim
Jerusalemē/ tr pee wiſſeem Lau-
dim/ kaſ no teem Pilſſahteem
Juhta us Jerusalemi nahze.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad laſſija Bahruks tai
Grahmataſ taos Wahrduſ Jerer-
mijus ta KUNGA Nammâ/
eeſch ta Kambara Geimarijuſ ta
Dehla Sawana/ ta Rafſtitaja/
augſtâ Pagalma/ preeſch ta
KUNga Naimma augſtu Wahr-
tu Durwim/ preeſch wiſſu Lau-
schu Aufim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Mikajus Geima-
rijuſ Dehis/ ta Dehla Sawa-
na/ wiſſus Wahrduſ ta KUNga
no tahs Grahmatas bij dsirdejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nogahje wiſſch ta
Fehnixa Namina/ eeſch ta Raf-
ſtitaja Kambara/ uu redſi/ tur
fehdeja wiſſi Leeli-Kungi/ Elisa-
mus tas Rafſtitajs/ un Dela-
jus Semajus Dehis/ un Elna-
tonus Akbora Dehis/ un Geima-
rijuſ Savana Dehis/ un Zede-
kjus Kananijus Dehis/ un wiſſi
Leeli-Kungi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mikajus ſtabſtija teem
wiſſus tohs Wahrduſ/ ko wiſſch
bij dsirdejs Bahruku no tahs
Grahmatas laſſam preeſch to
Lanschu Aufim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija wiſſi tee Lee-
li-Kungi pee Bahruka Juhti
Netantjus Deblu/ ta Dehla Se-
lamjus/ ta Dehla Kuſus/ uu faz-
zija: To Grahmatu/ eeſch ka tu
eſſi laſſijs preeſch to Lanschu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Aufim/ jemm tawâ Rohkâ/
uu nahz. Ta jehme Bahruks
Nerijus Dehis to Grahmatu fa-
wâ Rohkâ/ un nahze pee teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee ſazzija uſwinzu:
Apſehdees/ uu laſſi to preeſch
nuhſahm Aufim. Un Bahruks
laſſija preeſch winnu Aufim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee wiſſus Wahr-
dus dsirdeja/ iſbihjajahs weens
ar ohtru/ uu tee ſazzija uſ Bah-
ruku: Mehs ſtabſtiftm tam Feh-
nixam ſchohs Wahrduſ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee waizaja Bahru-
ku/ uu ſazzija: Stabſti mums
jelle/ ka eſſi tu wiſſus ſchohs
Wahrduſ no winna Muttes
rafſtijſ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Bahruks ſazzija uſ
teem : Wiſſch fanze wiſſus
ſchohs Wahrduſ no fawas Mut-
tes uu manni/ uu es rakſtiju
tohs ar Blakku Grahmatâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad ſazzija tee Leeli-Kun-
gi uhs Bahruku: Eij/ uu apſlep-
pees ty/ uu Jeremijus/ uu laid
neweens finna/ kur juhs eſſat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad gabje tee pee ta Feh-
nixa Pagalma/ bet to Grahma-
tu notikke tee eeſch Elisamus ta
Rafſtitaja Kambara/ uu ſtab-
ſtija preeſch ta Fehnixa Aufim
wiſſus ſchohs Wahrduſ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija tas Feh-
nisch Juhti to Grahmatu dab-
buht/ uu tas nehme to no Elisa-
mus ta Rafſtitaja Kambara/ uu
Juhti laſſija preeſch ta Fehni-
na Aufim/ uu preeſch wiſſo
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
